# Paper Tools

> Privacy-first PDF, image and document tools that run entirely in your browser. Files never leave your device — free, no signup, no installs.

Paper Tools is a collection of 38 client-side file tools, live at https://papertools.dev . Every tool runs entirely in the tab and does all processing locally; nothing is uploaded to a server. The interface is available in 7 languages (English by default, plus Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, French and German). The project is open source.

## Tools

- [Merge](https://papertools.dev/merge/): Combine several PDFs into one, in order.
- [Interleave](https://papertools.dev/interleave/): Merge front and back scans into correct page order.
- [Split & Extract](https://papertools.dev/split/): Pull out just the pages you need into a new PDF.
- [Remove Pages](https://papertools.dev/remove/): Delete pages you don't need from a PDF.
- [Reorder](https://papertools.dev/reorder/): Change the order of pages in a PDF.
- [Blank Page](https://papertools.dev/blank/): Insert a blank page anywhere in a PDF.
- [Rotate](https://papertools.dev/rotate/): Turn PDF pages 90, 180 or 270 degrees.
- [Crop](https://papertools.dev/crop/): Trim the margins of PDF pages.
- [Resize](https://papertools.dev/resize/): Make every PDF page the same size (e.g. A4).
- [N-up](https://papertools.dev/nup/): Print 2 or 4 PDF pages per sheet.
- [Images → PDF](https://papertools.dev/img2pdf/): Turn PNG/JPG images into PDF pages with size, fit, margin, and rotation options.
- [Watermark](https://papertools.dev/watermark/): Stamp text diagonally across every page of a PDF.
- [Page Numbers](https://papertools.dev/pagenum/): Add page numbers to the bottom center of a PDF.
- [Compress](https://papertools.dev/compress/): Shrink PDF file size with compression presets, image quality, target image size and optional grayscale conversion.
- [Metadata](https://papertools.dev/metadata/): Edit or remove a PDF's title, author and other metadata.
- [PDF Info](https://papertools.dev/info/): See a PDF's page count, size and metadata.
- [Protect](https://papertools.dev/protect/): Encrypt a PDF with an AES-128 password.
- [Unlock](https://papertools.dev/unlock/): Remove a known password from a PDF.
- [Image Convert](https://papertools.dev/imgconv/): Convert images between PNG, JPG and GIF.
- [PDF → Text](https://papertools.dev/pdftext/): Extract selectable text from a PDF to a .txt file.
- [OCR](https://papertools.dev/ocr/): Recognize text in a scanned PDF or image (English or Korean) and download a .txt file.
- [PDF → Images](https://papertools.dev/pdf2img/): Render selected PDF pages as PNG or JPG images in a ZIP, with scale and JPG quality options.
- [Extract Images](https://papertools.dev/pdfimages/): Pull embedded images out of a PDF into a ZIP.
- [Text → PDF](https://papertools.dev/txt2pdf/): Turn text into a PDF, with Korean font support.
- [Word → PDF](https://papertools.dev/docx2pdf/): Convert .docx text into a PDF (text-focused).
- [Hangul → PDF](https://papertools.dev/hwpx2pdf/): Convert .hwpx text into a PDF (text-focused).
- [Old Hangul → PDF](https://papertools.dev/hwp2pdf/): Convert old .hwp text into a PDF (text-focused).
- [Word → Hangul](https://papertools.dev/docx2hwpx/): Convert .docx to .hwpx (text and paragraphs only).
- [Hangul → Word](https://papertools.dev/hwpx2docx/): Convert .hwpx to .docx (text and paragraphs only).
- [PDF → Word](https://papertools.dev/pdf2docx/): Convert a PDF's text into a .docx (text and paragraphs only).
- [PDF → Hangul](https://papertools.dev/pdf2hwpx/): Convert a PDF's text into a .hwpx (text and paragraphs only).
- [Markdown → PDF](https://papertools.dev/md2pdf/): Convert a Markdown (.md) file to PDF, with Korean font support.
- [Excel → CSV](https://papertools.dev/xlsx2csv/): Convert an .xlsx workbook's sheets to CSV (or a ZIP of CSVs for multiple sheets).
- [Image Resize](https://papertools.dev/imgresize/): Shrink an image to a maximum width/height; never upscales.
- [Stamp / Signature](https://papertools.dev/stamp/): Overlay a stamp or signature image onto PDF pages at a chosen position, size and opacity.
- [Flatten PDF](https://papertools.dev/flatten/): Make visible annotation and form appearances part of the page content.
- [Compare PDFs](https://papertools.dev/pdfdiff/): Compare the extracted text of two PDFs and download a diff report.
- [Direct Send](https://papertools.dev/send/): Send a file straight from one device to another; the file moves only between the two devices and is never uploaded anywhere.

## Key facts

- All processing happens client-side, in the user's browser — no file is ever uploaded to a server.
- Free to use, for every tool, with no account or signup.
- Works in any modern browser, on desktop or mobile, with no installation.
- Open source: https://github.com/jisung-02/paper-tools
- Password protection uses AES-256 (recommended) or AES-128 encryption.
- Document-to-PDF conversions (Word, Hangul/HWPX, old Hangul/HWP, Markdown) are text-only — layout, tables and images are not preserved.
- PDF → Word and PDF → Hangul are also text-only: the PDF's text is extracted and rebuilt as paragraphs, with no layout, images or tables preserved.
- Excel → CSV keeps date cells as their raw Excel serial number, not a calendar date.
- Compare PDFs compares extracted text only, not visual layout.
- OCR supports English and Korean text and works best on clean, high-resolution scans; handwriting recognition is unreliable. Like every other tool, all processing (and loading of any supporting data) stays on papertools.dev — nothing is ever fetched from a third-party server.
- Direct Send needs both devices to be reachable from each other directly, so it usually only works when they're on the same Wi-Fi or local network; there's no server that helps them find each other across different networks.
